feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Modify text for purchase order print output (ME9F)
entry.content:
Dear Experts, There is some text printed on purchase order output (ME9F). I am not able to figure out how I can update it. Any idea please?

For eg: I want to update below text which is in the last page of the purchase order when I take out the printout by ME9F.

entry.title: How can I use the lifnr field in the select statement with both IN and LIKE?
entry.content:
SELECT
bukrs
gjahr
budat
lifnr
waers
FROM vsak INTO TABLE lt_blg
WHERE bukrs IN s_bukrs
AND lifnr IN s_lifnr ( AND ) lifnr LIKE 'OOOO9%' *******************************
AND budat IN s_budat.

HI,

*************How can I use the lifnr field in the select statement with both IN and LIKE?
What is the correct combined code?

Many Thanks for any help..!!!!

entry.title: Error message when reverse document via MR8M
entry.content:
Hi friends, 

There's an error message triggered when reverse document via MR8M:

' Acc assgt 01 for order item (PO) 00001 does not exist'

 

Kindly help me on how to solve this

entry.title: Periodic report for number of concurrent users in SAP.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to get the number of concurrent users periodically in SAP. Is there any SAP report which can provide this detail periodically? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Refurbishment logistic process
entry.content:
Good morning,
I would like to ask for help regarding the logistical process in Refurbishment orders.
From transaction IW8W I see that the Movement Type is automatically set to 101.

I tried to configure the V_DITCOKO customizing table but without being able to modify.
Can anyone confirm that the field is editable? and if so, is it possible to insert a custom movement?
Thank You in advance,
Matteo

entry.title: Trying to extend field input "Amount per open item account item" number entry in OBA4
entry.content:
Hello,

 Could someone help with this? Im trying to extend the input amount for "Amount per open item account item" to 14 digits (999,999,999,999.99). Currently it is limited to 12 digits (9,999,999,999.00). Thanks.

entry.title: Blank serial number on customer report
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new here, and I'm a sales Admin. 

I'm facing an issue while generating the maintenance report for a newly installed machine the serial number is showing blank, although inside the service order itself it's showing clearly. 

Any idea what could be the problem and how can be fixed. (This is the first time i experience this issue)
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Cancel release should be avoided
entry.content: Once the PO has been released, it should not allow us to cancel release, already used the indicator as 1 i,e can not be changed but also i am able to cancel the release in ECC. Please suggest on this

entry.title: Oracle DB Transaction Statistics
entry.content:
How to determine the number of database transactions occurring in an Oracle database on a specific date? 

(How many updates, inserts, or deletions are occurring within a given date or specific time frame?, in the whole oracle DB) i.e. Whats the average DB transaction rate per day (from DB perspective)

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create new articles in mass
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a way to create a large number of articles in SAP B1.

Could someone help me?

entry.title: MTO - Non-valuated Stock - Results Analysis - FI Cost of Sales posting
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of the Make-to-Order Results Analysis posting, for Non-Valuated Stock, the RA config allows for an Income Statement (debit) posting and a Balance Sheet (credit) account posting.

As FI Cost of Sales does not post via Goods Issue (the finished product is non-valuated), the FI Cost of Sales posts via the Sales Order Settlement to CO-PA (transaction VA88), after Results Analysis has been calculated.

The Debit (Income Statement) posting would likely be to Cost of Sales, but am wondering what the Credit (Balance Sheet) posting should be?

And how this Balance Sheet account would clear?

Kind regards

David

entry.title: The user can use y tcode YMM_INV but in SUIM it does not reflect in the said User ID SAPOCMM6
entry.content: The user can use y tcode YMM_INV but in SUIM it does not reflect in the said User ID SAPOCMM6

how to delete client 101 data from table s033.

entry.title: SAP ERP ECC Warranty Inheritence in Functional Locations / Equipments (customer warranty,time-based)
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I would like to use the SAP Standard feature to inherit the Warranty date from a functional location (FLOC) to subordinate FLOCs and subordinate equipments. 

I read the SAP documentation and a lot of community posts. Nevertheless, it is still not working in our ERP ECC system - unfortunately....

We want to use the warranty time-based only and as customer warranty. (not counter-based, no supplier warranty). 

Therefore, I enter the warranty start and end date in the superior FLOC. Both checkboxes are ticked for "inherit warranty" and "pass on warranty". Nevertheless, I create a new subordinate FLOC and the warranty is not transfered. Installation or removal of the FLOC is not triggered the inheritence too... 


What is wrong? 
What prerequisites are necessary? 

Is it correct that the master warranty is only needed for counter-based warranty tracking?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: BOM from RMWB
entry.content:
Hello, once I've created BOM from recipe in RMWB is there any way you can see the number of the recipe in CS02 CS03 it was created from?

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Is any way to disable SQL Server transaction log while importing the TR
entry.content:
As we are trying to import the TR into the system my SQL Server transaction log get full and my system get down
so kindly suggest is any way we are disable my sql log while importing the TR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use of Oracle Standby database (Setup using datagurard) for System Refresh
entry.content:
We have a query on system refresh. SAP Production system is PR4 and test system is FU4. SAP version is NW 740 ERP 6. Kernel release is 753. DB release is IP_ADDRESS.

Currently SAP PR4 and FU4 database is hosted in Exadata machine RAC cluster with two active nodes. SAP PR4 has a standby database and replication is happening using Oracle Dataguard. 

DBA can clone and rename the PR4 standby database to FU4 database which then can be used for refresh of the SAP FU4? Because no restore is involved and coning can be done very quickly, this will save about 30 hrs of DB restore time. Please advise if this approach is supported by SAP. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Repetitive manufacturing Profile
entry.content:
Repetitive manufacturing (REM) profile is one of mandatory master data for Repetitive manufacturing process. It controls how-to carry-on planning and confirmation in Repetitive manufacturing process.

 

However, REM profile could create through system configuration as per business process.

 

Configuration:

 

REM Profile has below mentioned sections.

  1. Control Data1
  2. Control Data2
  3. Movement types

 

Let’s discuss on Control data1.

 

GI backflush at GR posting – This check box control whether BOM components consume at the same time when goods receipt happens.

 

RP confirmations -This would use in case of Make to stock manufacturing and long lead time. Consumption of components could be recorded at a time that is close to time of operations to which it assigned. This help to calculate value of WIP products.

 

Reporting point could also use to manufacture with /without Kanban.

 

This is two types Mandatory Reporting point and Optional reporting Point.

 

Mandatory reporting point: This should use if quantity of production line, need to confirm along with each report point.

 

Optional reporting -This should use if quantity of production needs to confirm at the end of Production process.

 

 

Automatic GR Posting at Last RP when backflushing: This will control to do goods receipt during backflush of Last reporting point.

 

Process Control: This help separate below process from goods receipt. This could config under node of separate backflushing process.

                                            1.Goods issue

                                             2.Activity posting.

 

Error correction for Backflushing: This will generate backlog of errors during backflush of components.

 

 

Execute correction in dialogue mode: With this, system would ask to fix backflush error immediately during confirmation instead of generating entries in COGI.

With Mandatory option, this would not allow to goods receipt without fixing backflush errors.

With Optional option, it would generate pop-up with all backflush error. But that could skip and post confirmation. Then it would generate entries in COGI.

 

 

Let’s discuss on Control data2.

 

Planned order Reduction: Reduce planned order of material with production version and that of material without production version.

 

Reduction Period: This is calculated by adding the number of days you enter here to the backflush date. The system reduces all planned orders and run schedule quantities in the period of reduction.

 

Firming Logic:

With option “Always firm”- Update firming indicator in planned order which generate through Planning table.

 

With option “Do not firm”- Do not update firming indicator in planned order which generate through Planning table.

 

With option “Firm within plng time fence”-Update firming indicator in planned order if it falls with planning time fence of material.

 

Create planned orders when reversing: Will re-create planned order which were reduced during backflush, when reversing backflush.

 

 

Aggregate requirements: This will decide whether all dependent requirement of component grouped together to total requirement for a day when there is various requirement for that component on that day.

 

 

Movement type section has all movement types such as 261,262,131,132 etc.
